category.name: zoo.premium.infoText
category.item: If you employ 6 assistants (excluding Dr. Lynn), you have a co-director and staff to help you. Simply click and the 6 assistants will get to work.
John, the feeding assistant, makes sure your animals are always well-fed and happy. If you have enough zoogros to feed, click on him and John will work diligently and reliably.
Pavel takes care of watering the animals. If you click on him, he will regularly provide water for your animals. But only if you have enough zoogros.
Slávek the cleaner takes care of the hygiene and cleanliness of your animals. If you click on him, he will clean the enclosures and provide a cozy home for your animals.
Everyone is looking forward to Sonia! Click on her and hire her: She will cuddle with your animals, so they won't be bored and will glow with contentment.
Jirka diligently sweeps every path and doesn't miss a single trash can. Things have to be tidy, visitors won't return to a neglected zoo. Hire him with one click and he'll take care of all the work.
The clever monkey Kešík is good with numbers: Click on him and hire him. He will bring you revenue from all the shops and buildings you build.
Dr. Lynn is responsible for the health of your animals. When you click on her, she will deliver the appropriate medicine to all sick animals!
From level %nextExpandLevel% your zoo will grow. Don't feel like waiting? So expand your zoo now.

Don't waste time and expand your zoo by 100% with just one click! With the maxi zoo expansion you save yourself the intermediate steps and you will have the maximum area available immediately. Don't hesitate!
Buy expansions for your hidden zoo with zoodollars.
Exchange your collected tools to expand your hidden zoo.
From April 21st to April 27th, the Easter Bunny will be dropping eggs at your zoo. Collect them and exchange them for Easter enclosure decorations, Easter bunnies, and Easter enclosures.

How practical! From April 21st to 27th, Easter helper Sonja will help you collect eggs. Even if you log out! You can then exchange the eggs for Easter enclosure decorations, Easter bunnies and Easter enclosures.
Buy this cake to get the birthday upgrade for your enclosures faster. This will give you more balloons and you can also get more birthday prizes.

Don't waste time and expand your zoo to 100% with just one click! With the max. zoo expansion, you'll save yourself the tedious intermediate steps and immediately have the maximum area available. Don't hesitate!

Don't waste time and expand your zoo by 100% with just one click! With the maxi zoo expansion you save yourself the intermediate steps and you will have the maximum area available immediately. Don't hesitate!
Buy an expansion for this zoo with zoodollars.
Expand your zoo with the tools you've collected.

Don't waste time and expand your zoo by 100% with just one click! With the maxi zoo expansion you save yourself the intermediate steps and you will have the maximum area available immediately. Don't hesitate!

Don't waste time and expand your zoo by 100% with just one click! With the maxi zoo expansion you will save yourself the intermediate steps and you will have the maximum area available immediately. Don't hesitate!

Don't waste time and expand your zoo by 100% with just one click! With the maxi zoo expansion you will save yourself the intermediate steps and you will have the maximum area available immediately. Don't hesitate!
Exchange small bats for sour ones to unlock new Halloween rewards.
Exchange little bats for sweets to unlock new Halloween rewards.
Buy this cake to get the birthday upgrade for your enclosures faster. This will give you more balloons and you can also get more birthday prizes.
Buy the Coastal Zoo expansion with Zoo Dollars.
Get the Undersea World expansion with Zoodollars.
This water barrel is a nice addition to the zoo and will add a rustic feel.
What a giant! This water tower will be visible from far and wide.
It's flowing now. The water fountain will provide refreshing water for your zoo. Water, just flow!
Practical! Storage boxes are perfect for climbing, sitting and playing. Children love wooden boxes.
How brilliant! The barn is a great place to play hide and seek. And in the winter there's plenty of room for hay bales.
Great storage room! There are a lot of interesting things in the underground storage room. But most of all, this storage room is very mysterious... what is hidden there?

category.name: zoo.premium.window.renew
category.item: Oh! The employment contract with this assistant has expired. Do you want to extend the contract?

category.name: zoo.premium.elixir
category.item: Secret recipe used in breeding shortens the breeding process by 50%

category.name: zoo.premium.breedingLab
category.item: Place a breeding station in your main or secret zoo to breed rare animals.

category.name: zoo.premium.nursery
category.item: Place a breeding station in your main or secret zoo so your babies have somewhere to grow up.

category.name: zoo.premium.assist.infoText
category.item: If you hire 6 assistants (excluding Dr. Lynn), the co-director will help you with the staff. Simply click on them and they will all get to work right away.
Feeder Honza makes sure your animals are always fed - as long as you have enough zoogros to cover these costs.
Click on Pavel and he will take care of connecting the animals - provided you have enough zoogros to cover these costs.
Slávek the cleaner takes care of the hygiene and cleanliness of your animals. When you click on him, he will clean your enclosures and provide a cozy home for your animals.
Breeder Soňa takes care of your animals, hugs them and offers them the love they deserve. Click on her and watch her at work!
Jirka diligently sweeps every path and doesn't miss a single trash can. Order has to be maintained. Hire him with one click and he'll get to work right away!
The clever monkey Kešík is good with numbers. Click on him and he will collect the revenue from all the buildings in the zoo for you!
Dr. Lynn is responsible for the health of your animals. When you click on her, she will deliver the appropriate medicine to all sick animals!
Click on Jindra and he will feed all your sea creatures! Algae, plankton or fish food - Jindra knows what to do!
Matej always has a hose in his hand! Click on him and he will fill your water tanks, but make sure you have enough resources to cover the costs!
Franta is a pool technician. Click on him and he will clean your water areas, change filters, and make sure the water is clean and safe for all the animals.
Janička is a marine mammal trainer. She plays with the animals and teaches them various tricks! Click on her and hire her.
